items.author: Iztok Franko
items.body_excerpt:
Another eventful day before NBA free agency opens today.

I tried to make sense with leverage plays coming from all sides.

LeBron. Smart. Duren. Kuminga. The restricted chase. And why the biggest Lakers news yesterday may have been...no news.
digginbasketball.substack.com/p/lakers-off...

items.title: 🚨 Late Night NBA Intel!
items.author: Marc Stein
items.body_excerpt:
🚨 Late Night NBA Intel!

Sources tell @jakelfischer.bsky.social and me that Portland has already been messaging to interested parties that it intends to keep Jrue Holiday after trading for Ja Morant.

Which is just ONE morsel of a monstrous Intel serving. TONS here: tinyurl.com/bde3f33k

items.title: LeBron James just came off a series against the Rockets, where he led the Lakers in minutes played, points, assists, and had the second-best plus-minus at +20. He did everything but sell hot dogs inside Crypto to get the Lakers into the second round. Stop minimizing his impact.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: LeBron James just came off a series against the Rockets, where he led the Lakers in minutes played, points, assists, and had the second-best plus-minus at +20. He did everything but sell hot dogs inside Crypto to get the Lakers into the second round. Stop minimizing his impact.

items.title: Barring a few of these players signing extensions vs new contracts, here are our 2026 free agent counts:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Barring a few of these players signing extensions vs new contracts, here are our 2026 free agent counts:

183 Total Free Agents (33.8% of the league)
154 Unrestricted Free Agents*
29 Restricted Free Agents*

*Numbers could change if there is late news on qualifying offers.

items.title: Assuming they pick up Cissoko/Krejci non-guarantees, Blazers now have 11 players under contract for next season and about $28m in room under the luxury tax. Can easily use the full MLE ($15m) to sign someone and still be well below the tax.
items.author: Sean Highkin
items.body_excerpt: Assuming they pick up Cissoko/Krejci non-guarantees, Blazers now have 11 players under contract for next season and about $28m in room under the luxury tax. Can easily use the full MLE ($15m) to sign someone and still be well below the tax.
